hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in "$HOME/.claude/.credentials.json"|"$HOME/.claude/settings.json") echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Refusing to edit the live Claude credentials/settings file. Use the repo scripts (apply_settings_merge.py) to change hooks."}}' ;; esac
f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in */scripts/*.py|*/tests/*.py) cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && python3 -m pytest -q ;; esac
